description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is wearing short, fitted boxer-style underwear and no other visible clothing or accessories. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and a trimmed beard, with defined facial features. The skin tone is light, and the musculature is subtly defined, especially in the arms, chest, and legs. The feet are bare, and the overall appearance is that of a generic, healthy adult male suitable for urban environments. No visible objects are carried, and the figure's posture is neutral and balanced.
description: A standing adult male in boxer-style underwear, arms outstretched in a T-pose, with short hair and bare feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and front of the legs, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side of the legs and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the backs of the legs, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, torso, and limbs from the opposite side.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
